description_long: This advertising board consists of a large, rectangular display panel mounted atop a sturdy, vertical pole. The display surface features a colorful printed advertisement, including images of an office chair, a person relaxing outdoors, and prominent Cyrillic text, suggesting a commercial promotion. The frame of the board is thick and black, providing a solid border around the advertisement. The supporting pole is blue and square in cross-section, anchored to a black base for stability. The overall construction appears robust, likely designed to withstand outdoor urban conditions. No visible lighting or electronic features are present, indicating a static, non-illuminated display.
description: A freestanding, pole-mounted advertising board with a thick black frame and a static printed advertisement, supported by a blue square pole and black base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the board and the supporting pole, with no visible advertisement details.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full advertisement, thick black frame, and blue supporting pole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the narrow profile and support structure.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, but the advertisement is still visible, indicating a double-sided display.
attribute_frame_design: thick black frame with straight edges and rectangular corners
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed advertisement for office furniture and relaxation, with Cyrillic text and product images
